name: plugin install validate-source-folder check passes for the copied _community plugin namespace
command:
mkdir -p generated-code-quality-standards/_community/example/ns && printf 'source:
  id: example-src
  authoritative_publisher: example
  authoritative_url: https://example.com
  registry_link: x
  fetched_at: 2026-05-13T00:00:00Z
  content_hash: sha256:abc
rules:
  - id: example/foo
    detector: x
' > generated-code-quality-standards/_community/example/ns/main.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/generated-code-quality-standards/validate-source-file.sh" --file generated-code-quality-standards/_community/example/ns/main.yaml 2>out.txt && grep -q 'valid=true' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
